title: [codereview] uart1 enablement and build test for Heltec bench overlay
description: For lora_ipv6_mesh-9ia2 fix: after pinctrl addition, need overlay snippet or file for setting chosen{zephyr,console=&uart1; zephyr,shell-uart=&uart1;}, &uart1{status='okay'; current-speed=<115200>; pinctrl-0=<&uart1_default>; pinctrl-names='default';}, and ensure CONFIG_SERIAL=y CONFIG_UART_CONSOLE=n? or keep. Add to defconfig or conf if needed. Test build with west build ... -D DTC_OVERLAY_FILE=... . Verify no reset on port open using python -m serial.tools.list_ports and serial.Serial(port, 115200, dtr=False, rts=False). Use EC2 for Zephyr build if local SDK issue. Fix ALL before closing any related bead. 3 codereview passes required per workflow rule.
